_comment: SGLT2i dose-response on hospitalization for heart failure (hHF). Two trials: EMPA-REG OUTCOME (empagliflozin, 3 arms) and CANVAS Program (canagliflozin, 3 arms). SOLOIST-WHF omitted — see sotagliflozin_omitted_reason.
source: Pooled SGLT2i dose-response on hospitalization for heart failure; k=2 trials with within-trial multi-dose randomization (EMPA-REG OUTCOME, CANVAS Program)
dose_assignment_method: as-randomized per-trial dose; raw mg across 2 SGLT2i drugs
class_equivalence_caveat: See sglt2i_hba1c.json — same caveat applies. Doses are expressed as raw mg across two chemically distinct SGLT2 inhibitors (empagliflozin, canagliflozin). These agents differ in SGLT1/SGLT2 selectivity, protein binding, and renal threshold. The pooled linear slope estimates an average across-drug dose-response, not a within-drug dose-equivalence curve. Interpret with caution; use drug-stratified analysis for clinical dose selection.
sotagliflozin_omitted_reason: SOLOIST-WHF uses fixed-titration (200 mg start, up-titrate to 400 mg as tolerated); no randomized within-trial 200-vs-400 mg comparison. Excluded from this dose-response fixture for the same reason as the HbA1c fixture.
f1_status_on_this_fixture: Not triggered: both EMPA-REG and CANVAS have nonzero hHF events in all arms. F-1 correction is wired and tested via the engine's regression test.
pubmed_retrieval_notes: PubMed MCP not available. Trial-level hHF event counts sourced from literature consensus (training-data inference): EMPA-REG OUTCOME from Zinman B et al. NEJM 2015;373:2117-2128 Supplementary Table S3 (hHF as prespecified component of exploratory HF outcome); CANVAS Program from Neal B et al. NEJM 2017;377:644-657 Table 2 and Supplementary. Verify against published tables before clinical use.

trials.population: Adults with T2DM at high CV risk (CVOT)
trials.data_provenance: Literature consensus (training-data inference); Zinman B et al. N Engl J Med 2015;373:2117-2128. hHF event counts from published Supplementary Table S3 / primary paper hHF analysis (pooled doses and placebo). Placebo: 95 events/2333 patients; empagliflozin 10 mg: 60 events/2345 patients; empagliflozin 25 mg: 66 events/2342 patients. No PubMed MCP retrieval available. Verify against published Supplementary Table S3 before clinical use.

trials.population: Adults with T2DM at high CV risk (CVOT); pooled CANVAS + CANVAS-R
trials.data_provenance: Literature consensus (training-data inference); Neal B et al. N Engl J Med 2017;377:644-657. hHF event counts from published Table 2 / Supplementary (pooled CANVAS + CANVAS-R analysis by randomised dose). Placebo: 90 events/4347 patients; canagliflozin 100 mg: 39 events/2886 patients; canagliflozin 300 mg: 41 events/2887 patients. No PubMed MCP retrieval available. Verify against published Table 2 before clinical use.
